name: @meerkat/mobkit-sdk
description: Minimal Meerkat MobKit TypeScript SDK artifacts for parity tests

scripts.typecheck: npx --yes -p typescript@5.9.2 tsc --pretty false --strict --target ES2020 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --noEmit src/index.ts
scripts.build:check: tmp_dir=$(mktemp -d) && npx --yes -p typescript@5.9.2 tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --outDir "$tmp_dir" src/index.ts && diff -u dist/index.js "$tmp_dir/index.js" && rm -rf "$tmp_dir"
scripts.validate: npm run --silent typecheck && npm run --silent build:check
